name: Programmer Dungeon Knightress
short_description: Programmer Dungeon is a tactical game that challenges players to use logic programming to solve puzzles and progress through each level. Collect unique skills, use visual programming to automate your character, and defeat your enemies. Plan carefully and enjoy this exciting adventure!
detailed_description:
More Games!



Community


About the Game



Attention, all brave adventurers!
Are you ready for a challenge? In Programmer Dungeon Knightress,
With limited movement comes great responsibilities!
Can you conquer the puzzles and obstacles that lie ahead?.

Embark on a tactical journey through Uzuk'vah's dungeon, where you'll use your programming skills to battle enemies and search for the fragments of the mystic dagger of A'thalá. With each level you descend, new challenges await.

Play as mercenary Kass and use a visual programming language to execute a series of commands and movements. Drag and drop your skills to build a sequence, hit play, and defeat all foes. With 6 hours of gameplay or more, handmade levels, and beginner-friendly challenges, Programmer Dungeon Knightress is an accessible and fun way to learn programming concepts and automate your skills to take on the enemies.

Optimize your sequences and aim to collect every golden shard of the mystic dagger of A'thalá. The adventure awaits, are you ready?

Best regards,
Dragon Lord Studio.

* We will have constant updates with new levels and some new adjustment.
